title: Fentanyl: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:

If you did not finish the entire lozenge, hold the handle under hot running water to dissolve all the medication, and then throw the handle away in a garbage can that is out of the reach of children and pets. To use fentanyl sublingual and buccal tablets, follow these steps: 
Separate one blister unit from the blister card by tearing along the perforations. Peel back the foil to open the blister unit. Do not try to push the tablet through the foil. Do not open the blister unit until you are ready to use the tablet. Place the tablet in your mouth above one of your upper back teeth between your cheek and your gum or under your tongue as far back as you can. Leave the tablet in place until it dissolves completely. It may take 14 to 25 minutes for the tablet to dissolve. Do not split, chew, bite, or suck the tablet; do not swallow the tablet whole. If any of the tablet is left in your mouth after 30 minutes, swallow it with a drink of water. If you begin to feel dizzy, very sleepy, or nauseated before the tablet dissolves, rinse your mouth with water and spit the remaining pieces of tablet into the sink or toilet. Flush the toilet or rinse the sink to wash away the tablet pieces. Other uses for this medicine
